MASTER JURY CALENDAR SET FOR JAN-12-2022 -- GRACE HARRIETT, ESQ. APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF; MATTHEW MATEJCEK, ESQ. APPEARING FOR DEFENDANTS ARIANA NIC CHAN AND LUIS MIGUEL CAAMAL PECH. -- TRIAL DATE IS CONTINUED TO FEB-16-2022 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 206. SANCTIONS IN THE AMOUNT OF $250.00, PAYABLE BY FEB-17-2022, IS IMPOSED ON ATTY. MATT MATEJCEK FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE COURT'S ORDER PURSUANT TO THE NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL AND TRIAL ORDER. ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS SET ON FEB-18-2022 AT 9:30AM IN DEPT. 206. OSC WILL BE DISCHARGED IF SANCTIONS ARE PAID PRIOR TO THE HEARING DATE. CASE IS ORDERED FOR A FURTHER MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE WITH SETTLEMENT HEARING OFFICER PANG LY. PARTIES WAIVE NOTICE OF THE NEW TRIAL DATE. JUDGE: SAMUEL K. FENG; CLERK: JIROQUE; COURT REPORTER: MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
